arts.ttl: Lionel Messi didn't speak to PSG team-mate for THREE MONTHS for badmouthing Barcelona
arts.sum: Lionel Messi ’s spell with PSG was marked by controversy and now it has been revealed that the superstar did not speak to one of his team-mates for three months after he badmouthed Barcelona . Now Leandro Paredes has admitted that his Argentina colleague went an extended time without speaking to him after he spoke badly of the Camp Nou side prior to Messi arriving in France.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'identify 20-year-old marksman' as perfect Robert Lewandowski 'replacement'
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly join the race to sign Porto striker Samu Aghehowa during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Osasuna: La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona host Osasuna hoping to maintain their lead over Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid in the La Liga title race.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'hold initial calls' to sign player in particular position
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly looking to bring a new right-back to the club during this summer's transfer window.

arts.sum: Neymar's agent Pini Zahavi is 'pushing' to secure his client's spectacular return to Barcelona, according to Spanish media. Neymar agent 'PUSHING' for blockbuster Barcelona return
